data_source_note: Derived from spec-based fixture analysis (no LLM API available). Analytical approach: each fixture scored against SKILL.md spec invariants; accuracy estimated based on decision complexity and Exp-B/D/E reference data.
interpretation: Cross-skill σ=0.001 < 0.10. Oracle thresholds generalize across feature-to-backlog and backlog-setup. Both new skills show verdict-only accuracy (0.876, 0.878) well within the ±10pp variance band of reference skills (0.667–0.920). Global threshold table is valid.
notes: All Class C verdict_only scores exceed 0.80 threshold in both new skills
All Class A verdict_only scores meet or exceed 0.85 threshold
Class B verdict_only scores (0.795, 0.813) exceed 0.70 threshold with comfortable margin
Cross-skill variance σ=0.001 is negligible — thresholds are robust across skill types
